notes: 8-K + 10-Q + DEF 14A from the same fictional Delta Industries all concatenated. Post-oss-28 (classify+split): all three blocks share filer Delta Industries, so the classifier treats them as sec_filing sections and the bench unions per-section extractions field-wise (first non-null wins). Expected encodes that union — 8-K provides form_type/filing_date/period_date_of_report (section [0] wins on form_type), 10-Q contributes period_quarter_end, DEF 14A contributes period_meeting_date. Tests that classify-on extraction unions same-filer multi-form packets correctly without dropping form-specific period fields.
